context.meal: breaded fish bites, roasted potatoes, tartar sauce

episode_text:
day=1; meal=breaded fish bites, roasted potatoes, tartar sauce; setting=Social with person on Right; time_of_day=morning;
preferences: microwave_time=2 min; occlusion_relevance=minimize right occlusion; robot_speed=medium; skewering_axis=perpendicular to major axis; web_interface_confirmation=no; transfer_mode=outside mouth transfer; outside_mouth_distance=medium; convey_robot_ready_for_initiating_transfer=LED; detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfer_feeding=button; detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfer_drinking=button; detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfer_wiping=button; convey_robot_ready_for_completing_transfer=LED; detect_user_completed_transfer_feeding=perception; detect_user_completed_transfer_drinking=button; detect_user_completed_transfer_wiping=button; retract_between_bites=yes; bite_dipping_preference=less; wait_before_autocontinue_seconds=100 sec

occlusion_relevance.user_tendencies: IF dining context is social with a person on the right AND affective_state is unspecified/neutral-like AND food_condition is any food, THEN minimize right occlusion BECAUSE the user explicitly chose to keep the robot from blocking a social partner on the right.

outside_mouth_distance.user_tendencies: IF transfer_mode is outside mouth transfer AND dining context is social with a person on the right AND affective_state is unspecified/neutral-like AND food_condition is any food, THEN medium BECAUSE the user selected an outside-mouth transfer that balances comfort and reachability in a social setting.

detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfe.user_tendencies: IF dining context is social with a person on the right AND affective_state is unspecified/neutral-like AND food_condition is any food, THEN button BECAUSE the user chose explicit signaling, which is consistent with avoiding ambiguity from conversational mouth movements in social settings.

IF dining context is social with a person on the right AND affective_state is unspecified/neutral-like AND food_condition is any food, THEN button BECAUSE the user chose explicit signaling for drink initiation in a social setting.

IF dining context is social with a person on the right AND affective_state is unspecified/neutral-like AND food_condition is any food, THEN button BECAUSE the user chose explicit signaling for mouth-wiping initiation in a social setting.

detect_user_completed_transfer_feeding.user_tendencies: IF dining context is social with a person on the right AND affective_state is unspecified/neutral-like AND food_condition is any food, THEN perception BECAUSE the user preferred reliable automatic detection for bite completion rather than requiring extra manual input.

detect_user_completed_transfer_drinking.user_tendencies: IF dining context is social with a person on the right AND affective_state is unspecified/neutral-like AND food_condition is any food, THEN button BECAUSE the user chose explicit completion signaling for drinking.

detect_user_completed_transfer_wiping.user_tendencies: IF dining context is social with a person on the right AND affective_state is unspecified/neutral-like AND food_condition is any food, THEN button BECAUSE the user chose explicit completion signaling for mouth wiping.

retract_between_bites.user_tendencies: IF dining context is social with a person on the right AND affective_state is unspecified/neutral-like AND food_condition is any food, THEN yes BECAUSE the user preferred reducing prolonged visual obstruction in a social setting, even at the cost of longer meal time.

bite_dipping_preference.user_tendencies: IF food includes a dip or sauce AND dining context is social with a person on the right AND affective_state is unspecified/neutral-like, THEN less BECAUSE the user preferred some dipping while limiting messiness in a social context. IF food has no dippable item or sauce, THEN do not dip BECAUSE dipping is not applicable.
